name: DrChrono EHR & Practice Management API
what_it_does: DrChrono REST API for cloud and iPad-based EHR and practice management platform. Enables AI agents to manage patient clinical records and appointments, handle encounter documentation and SOAP notes, process billing and insurance claims via RCM, retrieve patient demographics and medical history, manage e-prescribing via Surescripts, handle telehealth integrations, access lab and imaging results, manage patient portal communications, and connect medical practice data with third-party health applications.
use_cases: Accessing patient clinical records and appointment data from medical practice agents
Processing insurance billing and claim status from revenue cycle agents
Managing patient intake and clinical documentation from care coordination agents
Integrating DrChrono patient data with third-party health apps from interoperability agents
not_for: Large hospital systems without independent or small group practice focus
Non-clinical services without physician practice EHR workflows
Enterprise health systems without iPad-native clinical workflow focus
best_when: An independent physician practice or small medical group using DrChrono wants AI agents to automate clinical documentation, billing, appointment management, and patient communication workflows.
avoid_when: HIPAA: Clinical patient PHI — BAA required. DrChrono was acquired by EverCommerce 2022 — verify data handling policies under new ownership. Telehealth workflows must maintain HIPAA-compliant video platform compliance.

auth.notes: DrChrono uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Practice-level credentials with patient, clinical, and billing scopes. Developer-friendly API with Python SDK. API documentation via Swagger/OpenAPI. Webhooks for real-time patient and appointment events. Active developer community.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-provider monthly pricing; Hippocrates, Apollo, Apollo Plus, and Pythagoras plans
pricing.notes: Mountain View, California. Founded 2009. iPad-native EHR pioneer. Used by 150,000+ healthcare professionals. Acquired by EverCommerce 2022. Strong developer ecosystem. Apple partnership for healthcare. Free marketplace for 3rd party apps. Competes with athenahealth and Practice Fusion.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in API reference

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA: Clinical patient PHI — BAA required
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with Python SDK and Swagger docs
EverCommerce acquisition (2022) — verify data handling policy changes under new ownership
iPad-native design — API reflects mobile-first workflow patterns
Telehealth integration requires HIPAA-compliant video platform in addition to DrChrono API
Webhook events are reliable for appointment changes — preferred over polling
agent_readiness.security_notes: Clinical patient PHI. HIPAA, SOC2, ONC. OAuth2. US data residency. BAA required. EverCommerce parent company.

security_score_components.security_notes: Clinical PHI. HIPAA, SOC2, ONC. OAuth2. US data residency. BAA required.
